title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Uganda UNBS pre-export verification (PVoC Certificate of Conformity) requirements, ERA licensing conditions, UMEME and UEDCL distribution utility grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in project specifications, local fire and building authority installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements applicable to the Mombasa and Dar es Salaam landlocked corridors, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与乌干达UNBS出口前核查（PVoC合格证书）要求、ERA许可条件、UMEME和UEDCL配电公司并网要求、项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、当地消防和建设主管机关安装要求、适用于蒙巴萨和达累斯萨拉姆内陆走廊的UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與烏干達UNBS出口前核查（PVoC合格證書）要求、ERA許可條件、UMEME和UEDCL配電公司併網要求、項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、當地消防和建設主管機關安裝要求、適用於蒙巴薩和達累斯薩拉姆內陸走廊的UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, UNBS PVoC conformity scope determination, ERA licensing approval, UMEME or UEDCL grid-connection approval, fire or building authority installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Uganda UNBS PVoC Technical Regulations, ERA licensing conditions, UMEME and UEDCL grid-connection technical specifications, fire and building authority requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、UNBS PVoC合格评定范围裁定、ERA许可批准、UMEME或UEDCL并网批准、消防或建设主管机关安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行乌干达UNBS PVoC技术法规、ERA许可条件、UMEME和UEDCL并网技术规格、消防和建设主管机关要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、UNBS PVoC合格評定範圍裁定、ERA許可批准、UMEME或UEDCL併網批准、消防或建設主管機關安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏干達UNBS PVoC技術法規、ERA許可條件、UMEME和UEDCL併網技術規格、消防和建設主管機關要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Uganda's BESS market is primarily driven by off-grid and mini-grid solar-hybrid deployments under the GET FiT rural electrification programme and growing commercial-and-industrial (C&I) storage demand. Three regulatory gates apply to Chinese BESS exported to Uganda: (1) UNBS PVoC pre-export verification — a Certificate of Conformity from a UNBS-appointed inspection body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek, or equivalent) is required before shipment; Chinese GB/T standards are not automatically accepted and UNBS requires evidence against international standards (IEC 62619, IEC 62133, or IEC 62933 as applicable); (2) ERA licensing — the Electricity Regulatory Authority licenses electricity supply and storage under the Electricity Act 1999; mini-grid and grid-connected BESS installations require ERA licensing and technical approval; (3) utility grid-connection — UMEME (distribution) and UEDCL handle distribution-level connections while UETCL manages transmission; grid parameters are 240/415 V 50 Hz, and PCS must be configured accordingly since China's grid is 220/380 V. Additional requirements include: IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 safety evidence for project acceptance; fire and building authority approval for installations; and UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory for the landlocked routing via Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) seaports. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in PVoC assessment or project/authority review.
answer_first.zh: 乌干达BESS市场主要由GET FiT农村电气化项目下的离网和微电网太阳能混合部署以及日益增长的工商业（C&I）储能需求驱动。中国BESS出口乌干达须通过三项监管门槛：（1）UNBS PVoC出口前核查——出货前须从UNBS指定检验机构（Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek或同等机构）取得合格证书；中国GB/T标准不被自动接受，UNBS要求提供符合国际标准（IEC 62619、IEC 62133或IEC 62933，视适用情况）的证据；（2）ERA许可——电力监管局依据1999年《电力法》对供电和储能进行许可管理；微电网和并网BESS装置须取得ERA许可和技术审批；（3）公用事业并网——UMEME（配电）和UEDCL负责配电级接入，UETCL管理输电；电网参数为240/415 V 50 Hz，PCS须相应配置，因中国电网为220/380 V。其他要求还包括：项目验收所需的IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2安全证据；装置消防和建设主管机关审批；以及通过蒙巴萨（肯尼亚）或达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）海港内陆路线所强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在PVoC评估或项目/主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 烏干達BESS市場主要由GET FiT農村電氣化項目下的離網和微電網太陽能混合部署以及日益增長的工商業（C&I）儲能需求驅動。中國BESS出口烏干達須通過三項監管門檻：（1）UNBS PVoC出口前核查——出貨前須從UNBS指定檢驗機構（Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek或同等機構）取得合格證書；中國GB/T標準不被自動接受，UNBS要求提供符合國際標準（IEC 62619、IEC 62133或IEC 62933，視適用情況）的證據；（2）ERA許可——電力監管局依據1999年《電力法》對供電和儲能進行許可管理；微電網和併網BESS裝置須取得ERA許可和技術審批；（3）公用事業併網——UMEME（配電）和UEDCL負責配電級接入，UETCL管理輸電；電網參數為240/415 V 50 Hz，PCS須相應配置，因中國電網為220/380 V。其他要求還包括：項目驗收所需的IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2安全證據；裝置消防和建設主管機關審批；以及通過蒙巴薩（肯雅）或達累斯薩拉姆（坦尚尼亞）海港內陸路線所強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在PVoC評估或項目/主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
